acceptance_scenarios: Production fake fallback scan passes against backend and mobile runtime paths.
Confirm responses expose commitStatus and projectionStatus.
Projection pending/failed projection states do not convert committed business facts into failed business confirms.
403, 409, and 422 outcomes have no business fact, submission, event, or outbox side effects.
Runtime field validation rejects invalid stable option values and non-canonical field keys.
Outbox minimum hardening keeps audit/outbox writes inside the confirm unit of work and uses claim/dead-letter attempt_count semantics.
MR-01 gate wrapper injects P0 failed evidence for missing required evidence before calling gate-runner.
go_criteria: projection pending not treated as failure
GateResult is generated by gate-runner with non-empty input_hash/result_hash
MR-01 gate status is machine-computed as passed, failed, or blocked
no_go_criteria: P0: Confirm can emit simultaneous confirmed/rejected
P0: required MR-01 command/test evidence missing
known_risks: MR-01 is guard/evidence only and does not promote business runtime behavior.
